landing.title: HiveDeliver - AI Swarm Drone Delivery
landing.subtitle: Autonomous last-mile delivery powered by intelligent drone swarms.
landing.heroTitle: Intelligent Drone Swarms for Last-Mile Delivery
landing.heroDesc: Our AI-powered swarm coordinates autonomous drones to deliver packages faster, cheaper, and smarter — optimized for SMEs across urban and rural areas.
landing.illustrationDesc: Drone swarms coordinate routes from warehouse to SME destinations in real time.
landing.whyFunctionTitle: From route intelligence to safety controls, HiveDeliver gives teams practical tools they can use every day.

benefits.fasterDesc: Swarm coordination cuts idle travel and reduces wait times for small businesses.
benefits.lowerCostDesc: Autonomous assignment lowers manual dispatch overhead and fuel-equivalent spend.
benefits.aiSwarmDesc: Hive-based intelligence balances tasks across drones in real time.
benefits.smartRouteDesc: Dynamic rerouting avoids congestion and improves successful delivery rates.
benefits.resilientOpsDesc: Automatic recovery logic keeps deliveries moving through sudden weather and traffic changes.
benefits.ecoSmartDesc: Battery-aware flight planning reduces unnecessary energy usage while keeping ETA commitments.

dashboard.title: Delivery Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Monitor active operations, delivery flow, and drone assignment in one place.

map.title: Live Drone Map
map.subtitle: Visualize warehouse dispatch, active drones, delivery routes, rural coverage, and no-fly zones in real time.
map.routeAdjustedSevere: Drone route automatically adjusted due to severe weather.
map.routeAdjustedCaution: Route optimized for moderate weather conditions.
map.routeNormalWeather: Weather conditions are stable for normal flight operations.
map.coordDesc1: The AI engine staggers departures and path vectors to reduce overlap risk and avoid mid-route conflicts. Rural and critical deliveries are prioritized when swarm logic is enabled.
map.coordDesc2: Hover over any drone marker to see real-time info including drone ID, parcels assigned, battery level, and estimated time of arrival.
map.swarmCoordinationSubtitle: Live drone-to-drone mesh data, adaptive routing, and task balancing across the active fleet.
map.currentCoverageFootprint: Current swarm footprint across active delivery lanes.
map.safeSeparationTracking: Autonomous spacing guardrails between neighboring drones.
map.weatherAndPriorityAware: Continuously recalculating for weather, battery, and delivery priority.
map.taskRedistributionEnabledMessage: Nearby drones redistributed to stabilize the route network.
map.trafficReroutedDrone: Drone {{droneId}} temporarily rerouted to reduce congestion.

order.title: Create Delivery Order
order.subtitle: Simulate AI-assisted order assignment based on priority and available drone capacity.
order.noDronesAvailable: No idle drones are currently available. Please try again in a few minutes.
order.droneAssigned: Drone {{droneId}} assigned. Estimated delivery time: {{eta}} minutes.
order.swarmAssigned: AI Swarm engaged! Drones {{drone1}} & {{drone2}} cooperating for heavy delivery. ETA: {{eta}} minutes.
order.heavyWeightAlert: Heavy parcel detected (>5kg). Activating Swarm Intelligence for cooperative delivery.

history.title: Delivery History
history.subtitle: Track all completed and failed parcel deliveries for your SME account.
history.searchPlaceholder: Search by parcel ID, address, or drone
history.noResults: No deliveries match the current filters.
history.feedbackSubtitle: Scan the QR code to tell us about your experience!

addresses.title: Saved Addresses
addresses.subtitle: Manage your frequently used delivery locations for faster order creation.

notifications.pageSubtitle: Stay updated with your latest dispatch, ETA, and delivery events.
notifications.hint: Notification updates are simulated with mock real-time events.
notifications.msg1: Drone H3 dispatched for Parcel P102
notifications.msg4: Parcel P106 failed due to weather corridor restrictions

weather.title: Weather Monitoring
weather.alertCautionMessage: Moderate weather impact detected. Drone routes may be slightly delayed.
weather.alertUnsafeMessage: Drone flights temporarily delayed due to weather conditions.

environment.title: Environmental Impact
environment.secondaryNote: Measured against van-based equivalent delivery routes.

support.pageSubtitle: Ask our AI assistant about order status, delivery issues, and platform help.
support.description: Use the chatbot below to quickly check parcel status, request help, or submit delivery support requests.

intelligence.title: Hive Swarm Intelligence Panel
intelligence.subtitle: Observe live AI system status for coordination, safety, and efficiency.
intelligence.feed1: Collision avoidance model refreshed 20 seconds ago
intelligence.feed2: Drone H2 rerouted to avoid dense no-fly zone corridor
intelligence.feed3: Weather compensation active for westbound fleet lane
intelligence.feed5: Battery optimization protocol engaged for H5, H7

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.subtitle: Explore logistics performance data generated by the HiveDeliver simulation.

fleet.title: Drone Fleet Management
fleet.subtitle: Track battery levels, status, and location across all active drones.

chatbot.greeting: Hello! I'm HiveBot, your HiveDeliver assistant. How can I help you today?
chatbot.action_createOrder_value: Send a parcel to Jalan Ampang, 2kg.
chatbot.action_droneAvailability_value: Do you have drones available now?
chatbot.action_costEstimation_value: How much to deliver to Cheras?
chatbot.action_orderModification_value: Change the delivery address to Bukit Jalil.
chatbot.action_maxWeight_value: What is the maximum parcel weight?
chatbot.action_cancelOrder_value: I want to cancel my order.
chatbot.responseParcelStatus: Your parcel P-1042 is currently en route with Drone H3, approximately 2.3 km away. ETA: 8 minutes. Last checkpoint: Jalan Ampang overpass at 2:14 PM. You can track it live on the Live Map page.
chatbot.responseCreateOrder: To place a delivery order: go to the Create Order page, fill in customer name, delivery address, and parcel weight. Drone H2 is currently available and can dispatch to Jalan Ampang in approximately 12 minutes. For parcels under 5 kg, a single drone is assigned. For parcels over 5 kg, 2 drones are automatically coordinated. Estimated delivery fee: RM 6.50.
chatbot.responseDroneAvailable: Yes! Currently 3 drones are on standby — Drone H1 (92% battery), Drone H4 (78% battery), and Drone H6 (85% battery). Estimated dispatch time is under 4 minutes.
chatbot.responseCost: Delivery fee estimate: RM 5.00 (within 5 km) · RM 7.50 (5–10 km) · RM 10.00 (10–20 km). Delivery to Cheras is approximately RM 8.00 (≈9 km from hub). Visit the Create Order page for an exact quote based on your address.
chatbot.responseHowItWorks: HiveDeliver uses an AI-powered drone swarm system: 1) Place your order with the delivery address and parcel weight. 2) Our AI assigns drones automatically — 1 drone for parcels ≤5 kg, or 2 coordinated drones for parcels >5 kg. 3) The drone(s) pick up the parcel and fly an optimized route. 4) Track delivery in real time on the Live Map. Delivery coverage: KL & Selangor. Operating hours: 8 AM – 10 PM daily.
chatbot.responseDelayed: I'm sorry to hear that! Please provide your Parcel ID (format: P-XXXX) so I can check the live tracking status immediately. If the drone is delayed due to weather or traffic, I will flag it for priority resolution within 15 minutes.
chatbot.responseAddressUpdated: Address changes are allowed up to 2 minutes after order placement. Please provide your Parcel ID and the new delivery address and I will update it right away. Note: an additional fee may apply if the new address is farther than the original destination.
chatbot.responseCancelled: To cancel your order, please provide your Parcel ID (e.g. P-1042). Note: cancellations are only possible before the drone departs the warehouse. Once the drone is dispatched, the order cannot be cancelled.
chatbot.responseOperatingHours: HiveDeliver operates daily from 8:00 AM to 10:00 PM, including weekends and public holidays. Orders placed after 10:00 PM will be queued for next-day delivery starting at 8:00 AM. For urgent after-hours assistance, email support@hivedeliver.my.
chatbot.responseMaxWeight: Our drones automatically adjust to parcel weight: parcels up to 5 kg are delivered by 1 drone; parcels exceeding 5 kg (up to 15 kg) are delivered by 2 coordinated drones working together. For parcels over 15 kg or fragile/hazardous items requiring special handling, contact support@hivedeliver.my.
chatbot.responseDefault: I'm not sure I understood that. You can ask me about: parcel tracking, delivery costs, drone availability, how to place an order, operating hours, or parcel weight limits. Use the quick action buttons above or type your question!
